hero.name: Pratik Vijay Shelar
hero.typingText: Frontend Intern Ready | MERN Developer | DSA Learner
hero.lead: Frontend-focused MERN developer building responsive interfaces, REST APIs, authentication flows, and database-driven systems. I am looking for a web development or frontend internship where I can contribute clean UI, reliable code, and fast learning.

about.title: Frontend-focused MERN developer with internship-ready proof.
about.note: Final-year CSE (AI) student building React interfaces, REST API workflows, authentication-based apps, and SQL/MongoDB-backed systems.

objective.title: Career Objective
objective.text: Final-year B.Tech CSE (Artificial Intelligence) student with a 7.99/10 CGPA and Web Developer Intern experience at Originedge Technology. I build responsive React interfaces, REST APIs, authentication flows, and database-driven MERN applications using MySQL, MongoDB, Prisma, and JWT.

academics.assetsText: Institution images and score card PDFs are linked below for quick review. Overall equivalent academic progress: 79.9% based on CGPA 7.99/10.

automation.title: Batch-ready student portfolio generation from JSON.
automation.note: This section demonstrates how the same portfolio layout can map structured student records into reusable UI blocks for GEMA Clubs, LMS workflows, and future WordPress integration.

workflow.title: JSON Payload
workflow.text: Student records are stored in a structured JSON payload with student info, school info, participation data, documents, contact details, and portfolio sections.

workflow.title: Reusable Mapper
workflow.text: The renderer reads the JSON keys and maps them into consistent portfolio cards, academic blocks, certificate sections, document links, and contact panels.

workflow.title: Single UI Template
workflow.text: The visual design remains reusable while each student profile can change through data only, making bulk updates faster and less error-prone.

workflow.title: WordPress LMS Ready
workflow.text: The same data structure can be adapted for WordPress custom fields, LearnPress course progress, Gamify achievements, and certificate pages.

journey.title: Training, internship work, and project-based learning.
journey.note: The portfolio combines internship tasks, structured training, GitHub projects, and steady C++ problem solving.

items.title: Originedge Internship
items.text: Working on React.js components, REST API integration, frontend debugging, Git/GitHub updates, and mentor feedback cycles.

items.title: Web Development
items.text: Built responsive pages, React interfaces, Bootstrap layouts, reusable components, and Vite applications.

items.title: Backend APIs
items.text: Created Express.js REST APIs with JWT authentication, validation, protected routes, and structured controllers.

items.title: Database Practice
items.text: Worked with MongoDB, Mongoose, MySQL, Prisma ORM, relationships, seed data, and CRUD operations.

items.title: MVC Architecture
items.text: Practiced project organization through routes, controllers, models, middleware, services, and utilities.

items.title: DSA Learning
items.text: Solved 150+ problems using C++ across arrays, strings, recursion, searching, sorting, and logic building.

experience.title: Web Developer Intern at Originedge Technology.
experience.note: Current internship work adds real team workflow, code iteration, and production-style frontend practice to the project portfolio.

items.title: Web Developer Intern - Originedge Technology
items.text: Develop reusable React.js components and responsive page sections, integrate REST APIs, resolve frontend bugs, test UI behavior across browser states, and maintain structured Git/GitHub updates from mentor feedback.

achievements.title: Measurable progress and portfolio milestones.
achievements.note: Achievement content highlights DSA practice, GitHub activity, internship growth, and documented project work.

items.title: 150+ DSA Problems
items.text: Solved using C++, improving problem-solving skills in arrays, strings, recursion, searching, sorting, and logic building.

items.title: 15+ GitHub Repositories
items.text: Maintained public repositories across MERN stack, SQL, REST APIs, CRUD apps, frontend apps, games, and AI/computer vision basics.

items.title: GitHub Achievements
items.text: Earned Quickdraw, Pull Shark, and YOLO badges while practicing public code contribution and repository maintenance.

items.title: Internship Workflow
items.text: Practiced React component development, frontend debugging, API integration, and Git-based mentor feedback cycles.

projects.title: Featured projects with code, UI evidence, and stack details.
projects.note: Projects show practical frontend, backend, database, authentication, API, and deployment experience.

items.title: Maintenance Ticket Management Web Application
items.description: Full-stack ticket management system with login, dashboard, ticket creation, detail views, master data, role-based workflow, and database-backed CRUD operations.
items.back: Full-stack operational app with authentication, tickets, master data, dashboard metrics, and structured backend APIs.

items.title: WanderLust Stays
items.description: Airbnb-style MERN project with property listings, user auth, reviews, owner controls, map location support, image uploads, and deployment on Render.
items.back: MERN travel listing app with authentication, reviews, owner features, maps, uploads, and deployed backend.

items.title: React Weather App
items.description: Responsive weather dashboard with city search, loading/error states, dynamic visuals, live OpenWeather API data, and Material UI layout.
items.back: Live weather search with OpenWeather API, Material UI cards, dynamic weather visuals, loading states, and error handling.

items.title: Mini WhatsApp CRUD Chat App
items.description: Server-rendered chat CRUD application with Express.js, MongoDB, Mongoose, EJS templates, method override, and responsive custom CSS.
items.back: MongoDB CRUD chat app with Express routes, EJS views, method override, timestamps, and responsive WhatsApp-style UI.

items.title: Currency Converter
items.description: Responsive currency converter with live exchange rates, country flags, swap feature, light/dark mode, and API error states.
items.back: API-based currency converter with live rates, swap logic, country flags, dark mode, and error states.

items.title: Face Recognition Attendance System
items.alt: Map feature screenshot used as technical placeholder
items.description: Academic attendance system with face capture, recognition, student enrollment, Tkinter interface, and MySQL attendance records.
items.back: Python + OpenCV attendance system with face capture, recognition, student enrollment, and MySQL attendance records.

blog.title: Short notes on learning and project work.
blog.note: Concise developer notes that explain how I think about projects, practice, and continuous learning.

items.title: My Journey from Student to MERN Stack Developer
items.summary: I started with frontend basics, moved into backend routing and databases, and gradually connected both sides through full-stack projects.
items.more: This journey helped me understand how UI, APIs, validation, and databases work together in real applications.

items.title: What I Learned While Building Full Stack Projects
items.summary: Real projects taught me authentication, protected routes, schema design, API testing, validation, uploads, deployment, and debugging discipline.
items.more: The biggest lesson was that clean structure matters as much as adding features.

items.title: Why DSA and Projects Both Matter for Developers
items.summary: DSA improves structured thinking, while projects teach product flow, user experience, and practical engineering decisions.
items.more: Together, they build both interview confidence and practical engineering maturity.

testimonials.title: Signals from learning, review, and collaboration.

items.title: Team mindset

intro.label: Professional profile summary
intro.title: Hi, I am Pratik Vijay Shelar.
intro.text: I am a final-year Computer Engineering student specializing in AI, a Web Developer Intern at Originedge Technology, and a frontend-focused MERN developer. I build responsive interfaces, REST API workflows, authentication-based apps, and database-driven projects, with 150+ C++ DSA problems solved and 15+ GitHub repositories.

quotes: Build quietly. Let the projects speak.
Great software starts with clear thinking.
DSA sharpens logic. Projects sharpen judgment.
